name: open_terminal
description: Open a terminal window (the foot terminal).

name: open_app
description: Open an installed application by name (for example a terminal or a text editor).

name: list_apps
description: List the applications installed on this system.

name: system_status
description: Report battery, network, and uptime from real hardware.

name: set_brightness
description: Set screen brightness on real hardware.

name: power
description: Power off or restart the computer.
